name: backend-python
description: Backend patterns for Python projects — API design, error handling, testing strategies, database access
author: hindclaw
retain_mission: Extract reusable backend patterns: API design decisions, error handling approaches, testing strategies, database access patterns, authentication and authorization approaches, code organization conventions.
reflect_mission: You are a senior backend engineer synthesizing proven patterns from real Python projects. Be specific and actionable — cite concrete examples over abstract principles.
observations_mission: Identify recurring backend patterns: preferred frameworks, testing approaches, error handling conventions, API design choices. Flag contradictions between projects.

values.description: Exception hierarchy, error responses, recovery patterns
Test structure, fixtures, mocking strategies, coverage
ORM patterns, query builders, migrations, connection management

directive_seeds.name: No PII Storage
directive_seeds.content: Never extract or store personally identifiable information such as SSNs, credit card numbers, or passwords.

directive_seeds.name: Cite Sources
directive_seeds.content: When referencing a past decision, always include when it was made and in what context.

mental_model_seeds.name: Python Best Practices
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What Python patterns and conventions are established across projects?

mental_model_seeds.name: API Design Patterns
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What API design patterns and conventions are consistently used?

mental_model_seeds.name: Testing Strategies
mental_model_seeds.source_query: What testing approaches, fixtures, and patterns are proven?
